calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants American Medical Response West And Tegan Durham Reiss To Plaintiff?S Request For Production Of Documents Set 1, Number 18, And Set 2, Numbers 19-53
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KRISTINA VEACO's Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants American Medical Response West And Tegan Durham Reiss To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents Set 1, Number 18, And Set 2, Numbers 19-53.

No appearances are made in this matter. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Kristina Veaco's motion to compel further responses from defendants American Medical Response West and Tegan Reiss to Veaco's set one and set two document requests is granted. No later than May 13, 2026 defendants shall produce all responsive documents to set one request 18 and set two requests 19-53 and serve verified code-compliant further responses stating that they have produced all responsive documents. The safety handbook and related training materials and the dispatch logs all meet the standard for discovery relevance. Defendants have not shown that any of the documents should be covered by a confidentiality protective order. The sole evidence that defendants offer in support of their argument for a protective order is the declaration of their attorney. That declaration is necessarily based on hearsay, lacks personal knowledge, and has no probative value on the issue of defendants' need to protect the responsive documents.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: S. Kane, Not Reported (301/HEK)
